lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It requires significant mechanical repairs and shows heavy wear on the interior and exterior. It is not in reliable running order.
This vehicle is in mint condition. It has no mechanical defects and no cosmetic damage. The exterior and interior are in pristine condition with no signs of wear.

Looking for a reliable daily driver that won't break the bank? This car is a fantastic choice for anyone needing a steady, functional vehicle. While it shows some honest cosmetic wear and tear from its travels, it remains a dependable companion on the road. It's ready for its next adventure with you!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. It currently has significant mechanical issues, including an engine that requires a complete overhaul and a transmission that is slipping badly. The exterior has extensive rust on the rocker panels and several large dents on the driver's side. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears, and the electronic systems, including the air conditioning and power windows, are non-functional. This car would be best suited as a parts vehicle or a major restoration project for someone with the necessary tools and expertise.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its life. Mechanically, the car is solid; the engine runs smoothly, and the transmission shifts as it should without any hesitation. All essential electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully operational. On the exterior, the paint still holds a nice shine, though there are a few minor stone chips on the hood and a small scuff on the rear bumper from normal use. The interior is clean and smoke-free, with only light wear on the driver's seat bolster. Overall, this is a dependable vehicle that is ready for its next owner with no immediate maintenance required.

Presented in exemplary condition, this vehicle has been maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. The exterior maintains a showroom-quality luster, complemented by an interior that remains entirely unblemished. Every mechanical component performs with factory-grade precision, ensuring a driving experience of the utmost caliber. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of such distinguished quality and uncompromising integrity.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is in incredible shape! I’ve babied this car since day one—honestly, it still looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. No scratches, no dents, and the interior is absolutely spotless. If you're looking for something that’s been meticulously cared for and is ready for a new home, this is the one. You won't find another one this clean!
Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, a masterclass in naturally aspirated performance. The S54 power plant exhibits perfect valve clearances and a
Pristine condition. No scratches or mechanical issues. Smoke-free interior. Full service history included.

This vehicle is the definition of a 'time capsule,' preserved in absolute showroom condition. The exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from any chips, swirl marks, or imperfections, and has been recently treated with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is immaculate; the premium upholstery shows no signs of wear, the carpets are pristine, and the original scent remains. Every technological feature, from the infotainment system to the advanced driver aids, operates with factory precision. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. This car has been strictly garage-kept, never seen a winter, and comes with a complete set of service records and a clean title. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is an unparalleled opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and performs exactly as it did the day it was delivered.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle exemplifies meticulous ownership, featuring an unblemished exterior and a pristine interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection.

Presented for the discerning collector, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an uncompromising standard, every surface reflects a showroom-quality finish, entirely devoid of imperfection. This is an investment-grade example that offers a definitive driving experience for those who refuse to settle for anything less than absolute excellence.

Hey there! You've absolutely gotta see this beauty! I've taken such incredible care of her, she's basically in showroom condition. Seriously, the paint is sparkling and the interior still has that fresh feel—it's like stepping back in time to the day it was first bought. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’m looking for someone who will love it just as much as I have. Come take it for a spin, you won't be disappointed!

Available is a museum-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies. This example is mechanically flawless, boasting a comprehensive service history including
2022 model. Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history. Garage kept. Inspection welcome.

This vehicle is a true 'time capsule' specimen, presented in showroom condition. The exterior features a flawless, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips or swirl marks, further enhanced by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no creasing, the original floor mats are untouched, and every electronic feature operates with factory precision. Mechanically, the car is in peak performance, benefiting from a documented history of preventative maintenance and a life spent in a climate-controlled garage. With a completely clean undercarriage and a single-owner pedigree, this is an investment-grade example that offers an authentic new-car experience. It is, without exaggeration, the finest example of its kind currently available.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This unit remains in showroom condition, reflecting a level of care that borders on the fastidious. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail presents as new, offering the discerning buyer a rare opportunity to acquire a virtually flawless example of this model.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard of excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, showroom-quality condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that exhibits no measurable wear. Rigorously inspected and mechanically beyond reproach, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute gem! It's in stunning, mint condition and has been incredibly well-loved—honestly, it looks and drives just like it did the day it left the showroom. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically brand new, this is definitely the one for you. I've taken such good care of it, and I'm sure you'll fall in love the moment you get behind the wheel. Come take it for a spin!

Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. Clean title. High-performance trim.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since its initial purchase. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero swirl marks, chips, or imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and fragrant, showing no signs of wear, creasing, or sun damage; every switch and dial operates with factory-new precision. Mechanically, the car is flawless, backed by a comprehensive folder of service records from authorized dealerships. It sits on a fresh set of high-performance tires and has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets the highest standards. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplar of automotive excellence, maintained in pristine, showroom condition. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of investment-grade quality, featuring an unblemished exterior and a meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been subjected to rigorous inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning collector who demands the pinnacle of its class, this vehicle stands as a testament to superior stewardship.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to an impeccable standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a rigorous adherence to preventative maintenance protocols. A definitive acquisition for the connoisseur seeking uncompromised quality and performance.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, this car is in incredible shape—it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's been garage-kept and babied since day one. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. You won't find a single scratch on it! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Mint condition. Clean title. No exterior or interior damage. Garage kept. All maintenance current.

Experience automotive perfection with this truly exceptional vehicle, preserved in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and professionally detailed, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state, with the premium leather upholstery still retaining its factory-fresh scent and no signs of wear on any touchpoints. Every mechanical component has been maintained to the highest standard with a complete, documented service history from the original dealer. It drives exactly as it did the day it rolled off the lot—smooth, powerful, and whisper-quiet. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that defies its age. No accidents, no stories, just pure excellence.

Presenting a vehicle of unrivaled distinction, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class. Meticulously curated and maintained to an exacting standard, the exterior finish remains flawless, while the cabin retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the absolute precision expected of a premier-grade automobile. This is a rare acquisition for the discerning driver who demands uncompromising quality and an impeccable service history.
